meta.name: 简洁
meta.notes: Layout/typography ported from doocs/md by import-theme.mjs (doocs-css). doocs is color-agnostic; accent "#2f9e8f" chosen for this port. WTFPL, Copyright (C) 2025 Doocs <admin@doocs.org>. See themes/CREDITS.md.

page.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', Arial, sans-serif

h3.style: padding-left:12px;border-left:4px solid {{accent}};margin:2em 8px 0.75em 0;color:{{heading}};font-size:19px;font-weight:bold;line-height:2.4em;border-radius:6px;border-right:1px solid rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.1);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.1);border-top:1px solid rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.1);background:rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.08);

blockquote.style: font-style:italic;padding:1em 1em 1em 2em;border-left:4px solid {{accent}};border-radius:6px;color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);background:{{bgSoft}};margin-bottom:1em;border-bottom:0.2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);border-top:0.2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);border-right:0.2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);

code.style: font-size:90%;color:{{accent}};background:rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.08);padding:3px 5px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(47, 158, 143, 0.15);font-family:'Fira Code', Menlo, Operator Mono, Consolas, Monaco, monospace;

pre.style: font-size:90%;overflow-x:auto;border-radius:8px;line-height:1.5;margin:10px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);background:#f6f6f6;color:{{text}};font-family:'Fira Code', Menlo, Consolas, Monaco, 'Courier New', monospace;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-all;padding:14px 16px;
